title: Add --authfile to podman search
body:
Since podman search requires credentials to search private registries,
add the --authfile flag to allow users to pass in credentials from a
different authfile than the default one.

Vendor in latest containers/image
Fixes issue with podman search of private registries. Podman search
was not picking up the credentials from the authfile. This fixes it.

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: Change LGTM, just wondering if this and #999 will conflict on the vendor...
Can we get a test for this?
Can we? Not sure if we ever got authentication with private registries working for tests. @TomSweeneyRedHat I remember you were working on this?
Ok lets merge and then we can work on a test later or at least add it to the test script.

:pushpin: Commit 94a535e has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 94a535e79e8c89c2232b29ddb647ca41d257a61a -->
Certs are still a sticking point in Travis CI.  Will get it put into the scripts though for at least short term "by hand" testing.
